name: unstructured_med_flag
description: Separates unstructured (free-text, no FDB/RxNorm code) medications under an 'Unstructured Medications' heading below the coded medications in the patient chart medication list so they are obvious to the provider.

handlers.description: Groups coded medications first (no heading) and unstructured medications below under an 'Unstructured Medications' heading in the patient chart medication list.
